attempt_local_note: The canonical closed_loop_development_verdict.py consumer requires a closed-loop-current-state projection resolving to a canonical closed-loop-attempt-state.v1 leaf with required_actor 'human_reviewer'. No such attempt-state file exists for this attempt-local B/C1/C2 lineage (the same gap that kept C2 on the minimal honest artifact set instead of the v4 packet machinery). This verdict is therefore recorded as a minimal honest attempt-local instance of the same schema, not produced by the canonical consumer. It supersedes the historical human_review:'pending' fields in provenance.json and regression.json by lineage; those files are left unmodified as historical evidence.
verdict_translation: Accepted as a development baseline; overall polish/completeness is explicitly NOT claimed.
scope_note: Development-baseline acceptance of the bounded R5.2b repair only (Panel B 'increasing sulfur content' arrow split into a measured interrupted-arrow so the rendered path no longer crosses its own label). Overall figure polish and completeness are NOT claimed. This is not release acceptance and not publication acceptance. Strict compile does not pass: the 3 targeted check_undeclared_geometry findings are removed (3->0), but check_visual_clash --strict is a co-existing pre-existing failure identical in parent C1 and is unrelated to this repair.
